rewrites.comment: SPA fallback. Vercel checks the filesystem first, so /assets/foo.js still hits the hashed bundle; only unknown paths fall through to /index.html where useUrlSync routes the request (incl. /404 → NotFoundView).

headers.comment: Site-wide security baseline. Closes #20. CSP allows 'unsafe-inline' on style-src because framer-motion injects inline transform styles at runtime; script-src stays strict because all JS is hashed Vite bundles. connect-src will need to add the Sentry ingest origin once VITE_SENTRY_DSN is wired (#33).

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self'; media-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://*.ingest.sentry.io https://*.ingest.us.sentry.io; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; object-src 'none'

headers.comment: Hashed Vite assets — filenames change on every content change, so cache aggressively forever.
Self-hosted woff2 fonts ship with content hashes from @fontsource — same immutable cache.
index.html is the SPA shell — must always revalidate so a deploy ships the new asset hashes immediately.
